name: che-word-mcp
description: Word MCP Server - Swift 原生 OOXML 操作，233 個工具。v3.13.5 bump ooxml-swift v0.19.3→v0.19.5（v0.19.4 held-back per verify-gate）— closes R5 stack-completion (6 P0 + 5 P1 + R5-CONT 7 P0 + 5 P1 + R5-CONT-2 5 P0 + 4 P1 + R5-CONT-3 1 P0 + 4 P1 + R5-CONT-4 1 P0 + 3 P1 from #56 rounds 4-8 verify) via spectra-driven per-task verify gates（無 source 變更）。Round 4 walker symmetry across headers/footers/footnotes/endnotes（accept_revision/reject_revision/get_hyperlinks/replace_text 在所有 part 找到目標）。Round 5 per-container relationships round-trip（update_hyperlink URL sync 對應 owning part rels）。Round 6 delete_hyperlink mirror + reject_revision .insertion source-routing。Round 7 reject_revision typed clearMarker（file/API state 收斂）。Round 8 accept_revision typed clearMarker mirror + matrix-pin asymmetry-guard removal + Document.repairContainerFileNames 標記 document.xml.rels + [Content_Types].xml dirty。Convergence: Devil's Advocate 寫了 5 個 adversarial tests, 全部 PASSED。v3.13.3 round 2 verify 8 P0 + 3 P1。v3.13.2 round 1 F1-F4 hot-fix。v3.13.1 pPr double-emission hot-fix。v3.13.0 document.xml lossless round-trip（closes #56 P0）。v3.12.0 Track Changes（#45）。基於 ooxml-swift v0.19.5。
